description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test and lint that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has two jobs: tests and linting. The tests job runs on multiple Python versions (3.10-dev, 3.9, 3.8, 3.7, 3.6) with a ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, sets up Python, loads pip cache, installs dependencies, and runs pytest. The linting job runs on a single ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.9, loads pip cache, installs dependencies, and runs flake8 for linting.
